basic_details.job_title: KSPACE Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Kerala Spacepark (KSPACE) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Deputy Manager (IT). Candidates with B.Tech, MCA Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 13-05-2026, and closes on 27-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through KSPACE official website cmd.kerala.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. (IT/Computer Science)/MCA from recognized University with 1st class degree. Proficiency in reading and writing English and Malayalam languages is mandatory. Minimum 5 years' experience in the IT domain or field in reputed companies.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the KSPACE Deputy Manager (IT) Recruitment 2026.
